title: Users are intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate
impact: Users were intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate.

updates.content:
Title: Users are intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate

User impact: Users are intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue with Copilot in Power Automate and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Users are intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate

User impact: Users are intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate.

Current status: We've identified that the affected infrastructure isn't processing workflow requests as efficiently as expected, resulting in impact. We're routing traffic to an alternate infrastructure to remediate impact.

Scope of impact: Your organization is affected by this event, and any user attempting to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate are intermittently impacted.

Root cause: The affected infrastructure isn't processing workflow requests as efficiently as expected, resulting in impact.

Next update by: Tuesday, February 17, 2026, at 11:00 PM UTC

Title: Users are intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate

User impact: Users were intermittently unable to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate.

Final status: We routed traffic to an alternate infrastructure and confirmed using our internal telemetry data that impact is remediated.
 
Scope of impact: Your organization was affected by this event, and any user attempting to run workflows from Copilot in Power Automate were intermittently impacted.
 
Start time: Monday, February 16, 2026, at 10:00 AM UTC
 
End time: Tuesday, February 17, 2026, at 8:45 PM UTC
 
Root cause: The affected infrastructure wasn't processing workflow requests as efficiently as expected, resulting in impact.
 
Next steps: 
- We're reviewing and improving our automated detection and recovery services to more quickly address similar infrastructure processing issues in the future.
 
This is the final update for the event.
